titles.title: This Song I Sing for You

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There's a song in my heart that I keep Sufficient Grace that He has for me Who is unworthy of His great Love Yet He impart His Mercy for me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Now I know the reason He chose me Existed in eternity with Thee That's why O Lord Thou doest Love me A sinner and a wretch such as I

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: What can I offer to You Precious Lord Jesus Christ? There is none but a song and I will sing to You

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: And this song I sing for You I bestow it all for Your Glory, with the life that came Lord from You

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Unto You Lord I give honor The adoration, worship and praise O be Thou glorified Be Thou exalted in my life I surrender my all to You

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Now I know the reason He chose me Existed in eternity with Thee That's why O Lord Thou doest Love me A sinner and a wretch such as I
